summary: Comprehensive testing of MTLL Slot Engine MVP completed. Backend APIs fully functional (17/17 endpoints passing). Frontend UI working with minor overlay issue on configuration save button.

ui_bugs.issue: Button intercepted by Emergent badge overlay requiring force=True click
ui_bugs.workaround: force=True click works, but users may struggle clicking it normally

design_issues.issue: React hydration warning about <span> inside <tbody> in gaps table
design_issues.console_error: In HTML, span cannot be a child of tbody - causes hydration error

passed_tests: ✅ Dashboard loads with correct stats (12 jobs, 7 gaps, 5 strong, 2 tight)
✅ Timeline visualization shows scheduled jobs and gaps
✅ Gap Finder displays 7 gaps with STRONG/TIGHT filtering
✅ Viability Check processes postcodes (6/7 slots viable for test postcode)
✅ Preference Filter ranks slots by morning/afternoon preferences
✅ Configuration page displays all editable settings
✅ NextBillion API integration with fallback to Haversine estimation
✅ Josh's schedule seeded correctly from Excel data
✅ All three MTLL layers (Gap Finder, Viability Check, Preference Filter) functional
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix overlay issue: Emergent badge at bottom of page intercepts clicks on Configuration save button. Consider adjusting z-index or button positioning.
